svg.metadata: {"schema_version":1,"id":"20_right_ingress_merge","label":"Right ingress merges","topology":"A supported road enters from R0 and merges smoothly into the B0-to-T0 main road at a clear near-foreground Y junction.","sockets":["B0","T0","R0"],"socket_contract":{"B0":{"edge":"bottom","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.16},"T0":{"edge":"top","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.035},"R0":{"edge":"right","center":0.56,"direction":"horizontal","road_width":0.028}}}
